root_text.sn22.18:1.3: Yopi hetu, yopi paccayo rūpassa uppādāya, sopi anicco.
root_text.sn22.18:1.4: Aniccasambhūtaṁ, bhikkhave, rūpaṁ kuto niccaṁ bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.18:1.6: Yopi hetu, yopi paccayo vedanāya uppādāya, sopi anicco.
root_text.sn22.18:1.7: Aniccasambhūtā, bhikkhave, vedanā kuto niccā bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.18:1.10: Yopi hetu yopi paccayo saṅkhārānaṁ uppādāya, sopi anicco.
root_text.sn22.18:1.11: Aniccasambhūtā, bhikkhave, saṅkhārā kuto niccā bhavissanti.
root_text.sn22.18:1.13: Yopi hetu yopi paccayo viññāṇassa uppādāya, sopi anicco.
root_text.sn22.18:1.14: Aniccasambhūtaṁ, bhikkhave, viññāṇaṁ kuto niccaṁ bhavissati.

translation_text.sn22.18:1.3: The cause and reason that gives rise to form is also impermanent.
translation_text.sn22.18:1.4: Since form is produced by what is impermanent, how could it be permanent?
translation_text.sn22.18:1.13: The cause and reason that gives rise to consciousness is also impermanent.
translation_text.sn22.18:1.14: Since consciousness is produced by what is impermanent, how could it be permanent?
translation_text.sn22.18:1.16: They understand: ‘… there is nothing further for this place.’”
